title: Fix deployment error

requirements.text: Diagnose and resolve the deployment error that occurred during the previous build attempt
acceptanceCriteria: Application deploys successfully to the Internet Computer network
No deployment errors are reported during the build process
All existing features remain functional after deployment

requirements.text: Verify that all static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated are properly configured and accessible
acceptanceCriteria: Generated planner preview images load correctly in the PreviewSection
iPad mockup image displays properly in the HeroSection
No 404 errors for static assets in browser console

requirements.text: Ensure the backend main.mo actor compiles without errors and contains valid Motoko syntax
acceptanceCriteria: Backend builds successfully without compilation errors
Main actor is properly structured with valid Motoko syntax

constraints: Maintain all existing features and functionality
Preserve the current single-actor backend architecture
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
Keep the soft beige and lavender aesthetic design intact
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond fixing the deployment error
Changing the color scheme or visual design
Modifying existing text content or copy
